programs.title: Motel Rescue
programs.desc: Lindsey Kurowski takes her expertise to Guerneville, CA to help the owner of a rustic cabin motel that hasn't been updated in decades; she'll create an overall aesthetic, and make changes to help generate more revenue.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: The team takes on a rebuild for a family after a devastating storm destroys their camp; with five decades of memories to honor and a vision for a larger space, the crew battles freezing temperatures and a ticking clock to finish the cabin in time.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.

programs.title: Motel Rescue
programs.desc: Lindsey Kurowski takes her expertise to Guerneville, CA to help the owner of a rustic cabin motel that hasn't been updated in decades; she'll create an overall aesthetic, and make changes to help generate more revenue.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Weston, West Virginia to teach two young carpenter apprentices how to build a timber frame barn; along the way a 4H camper returns to the site to check out the cabin he and his fellow campers built with the guys.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.desc: The Barnwood Builders restore a timber frame home on a frozen field in West Virginia; Mark and Johnny visit an extraordinary mountain top retreat with a log home and timber frame pool house; Alex Webb builds a lord's table and bench at his workshop.
